name: JONES SODA CO.
business: The company develops, produces, markets, and distributes premium beverages in the United States and Canada through independent distributors, direct to retail accounts, and e-commerce. Products include Jones Soda, Pop Jones (modern soda), Mary Jones (hemp-derived THC beverages), Spiked Jones (alcohol-spiked sodas), and fountain offerings. The company also licenses its trademarks for use on products sold by other manufacturers.
sellsTo: independent accounts (delicatessens, sandwich shops, burger restaurants)

exposures.sentence: We develop, produce, market and distribute premium beverages that we sell and distribute in the United States and Canada through our network of independent distributors, directly to our national and regional retail accounts and directly to consumers through e-commerce.
We also sell various products online, including soda with customized labels and other items, and we license our trademarks for use on products sold by other manufacturers.

For example, in 2025 the Company entered into a merchandise license agreement with ZeniMax Media Inc., a Delaware corporation. ZeniMax owns the Fallout name and all names, art, characters, weapons and audio/visual elements from the Fallout franchise which includes the video game and related television series.
Since that time, Mary Jones has expanded its portfolio to include three flavors of 10mg Mary Jones shooters, four flavors of Mary Jones gummies, and a line of Mary Jones zero sugar sodas.
Additionally, in the third quarter of 2025 we launched our line of hard craft sodas spiked with alcohol under the brand name Spiked Jones.
In 2024, Jones launched its Pop Jones product lines to capitalize on this growing market opportunity.
we license our trademarks for use on products sold by other manufacturers.
